promotion_blockers: No protected-area, forest-cover, wetland, corridor, recharge, access, or no-publish geometries are imported.
SNIT/SINAC/SENARA layer terms, attribution, CRS, attributes, and redistribution limits still need final review.
Pacuare corridor intersections and sensitive-location policy are not approved.
Local guide/outfitter and conservation review is required before public route details or detailed screenshots.

metadata_review_findings: Layer-specific metadata JSON is available through POST /Metadatos/get_full_metadata for selected metadata-bearing SNIT layers.

SINAC protected areas, biological corridors, and wetlands advertise unrestricted access/use in metadata, but import still needs layer terms, attribution, CRS axis-order, and corridor-intersection review.

SINAC forest-cover 2023, SENARA station/recharge/vulnerability layers, and ICE utility layers record copyright or intellectual-property restrictions, so they remain blocked from import until terms and attribution are explicitly approved.
Distribution entries are WMS/service metadata only; no WMS map tiles, WFS features, shapefiles, time series, station records, or geometries were fetched.

needs: official protected-area/access layer intersection after terms review
local guide/outfitter review before access labels or route screenshots
generalized screenshot framing until sensitive polygons are approved
SINAC/SENARA forest, wetland, corridor, recharge, and vulnerability terms review
no-publish polygon screening before detailed gorge captures
rescue, swimmer, and guide-sightline annotation without exposing sensitive locations
approved put-in, take-out, road, bridge, and evacuation annotations
local publication-risk review before detailed route or access geometry
flow-dependent access and evacuation interpretation for rainfed/high-water variants
